title: goniophlebium demersum
intro: Goniophlebium demersum, also known as the waterclover or creeping fern, is a species of epiphytic fern native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Goniophlebium demersum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, as well as supporting immune function and cardiovascular health. Goniophlebium demersum can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
